questions.text: Describe the meaning and significance of constitution.
Differentiate between the Union and its Territory.
Explain the fundamental duties of Indian citizens.
Define State, under Article 12 of the Constitution.
What are the requisite qualifications for holding the position of Vice President in India?
Explain Special Leave Appeal.
Discuss the executive powers of the Governor.
Give a brief description about the Election Commission of India.
Write short note on Official Languages.
State the purpose of Administrative Tribunal.
Explain the significance of the preamble of Indian constitution.
Explain the historical background of the Indian constitution.
Explain the modes of acquiring citizenship under citizenship Act.1955.
Explain about deprivation of citizenship
Explain the nature of the right to freedom of religion in India.
Explain Cultural and Educational Rights?
Right to Constitutional Remedies is the soul of Indian constitution. Elucidate.
When might Fundamental Rights are not guaranteed or suspended?
Explain the powers of the President of India under the constitution.
Explain the writ jurisdiction of Supreme Court.
Explain the functions of the parliament.
Explain how the judges of Supreme Court are appointed.
Explain the steps in the appointment of Chief Minister.
What are the qualifications needed for Governor?
Explain the jurisdiction of High court. What are the essential qualifications required for the appointment of High court Judge
Explain the qualifications and disqualifications of membership of the state legislature.
What are the various functions of Finance Commission.
Explain the need of Administrative Tribunals.
Explain the procedure for amending the constitution of India.
Explain the effects of National and Financial emergencies
